safety_note: Public data only. No real funding partner names, private routing logic, affiliate links, apply links, private compensation data, private access details, borrower PII, or private review notes.
description: Public trust, safety, and expectation badges for pages and forms.

badges.label: No frontend credit pull
badges.summary: The public scorecard uses self-reported answers and does not run credit.

badges.label: Education-first guidance
badges.summary: The scorecard explains readiness and next steps before any deeper review.

badges.label: Human review when needed
badges.summary: Mixed or complex files should be reviewed by a person before next-step recommendations.

badges.label: Public-safe funding paths
badges.summary: Public pages describe funding families, not private partner-specific routing.

badges.label: Document prep before review
badges.summary: Better documents make review cleaner and reduce wasted follow-up.

badges.label: No false certainty
badges.summary: Readiness scores do not equal final funding decisions.

disclaimers.label: Standard Scorecard Disclaimer
disclaimers.copy: The Funding Readiness Scorecard is for educational readiness guidance only. It is not a funding approval, offer, commitment, or final funding decision.

disclaimers.label: Self-Reported Data
disclaimers.copy: Results are based on the answers provided and should be reviewed against actual documents before any next-step recommendation.

disclaimers.label: Document Security
disclaimers.copy: Do not submit sensitive documents through a public page unless a secure document workflow is provided.

disclaimers.label: Funding Path Limit
disclaimers.copy: Funding path descriptions are general categories and do not expose or represent private partner-specific criteria.
